item.title: Back To It
item.description: Back to running regularly. Taking it slow, but adding consistency and miles to get ready for race season.

item.title: Lazy Saturday
item.description: Lazy day spent doing chores, throwing the ball with the dogs, and playing computer games. We need a rest before Spring Break.

item.title: It's a Wash
item.description: Had a good run this morning through the snow. But then an appointment in the thickening snow followed by picking up Oscar from an early release and then having to shovel the driveway lead to the day being largely a wash.

item.title: Breaking
item.description: Taekwondo belt test tonight. I broke a brick with my foot; brick didn’t stand a chance.

item.title: Frustrations
item.description: Frustrations today on multiple fronts; no running because of icy rain last night, sorting through various and sundry customer problems at work, trying–largely in vain–to sort through Byzantine corporate policies and structures. But positives exist; onboarding a new back-end engineer, organizing our second all hands for my vertical, documenting and optimizing hiring processes for future growth.

item.title: Finally More Skiing
item.description: After an unfortunate number of weeks we got out for more skiing at Copper Mountain. Tiring with many runs, but felt great to be back out again.

item.title: Hanging Out
item.description: Hung out with my friend Elijah. Lots of talk about games; hatching plans to create some of our own.

item.title: Frustrations
item.description: Early meeting about auditing, leaving me no time to get Turtle to doggy daycare. Turtle was an asshole all day, compounding work frustrations.

item.title: Meetings and Breakings
item.description: Lots of meetings today, but good discussions all around, particularly the back-end discussion and coordinating with Lukan. Later went through breaks in taekwondo, where Oscar started things off strong and I crushed all of my adult boards and my simulated brick.

item.title: First Day Back
item.description: First day back from a vacation, even a short one, is always a challenge, with meetings, chasing information for my team, replying to emails and messages. Relaxing with Olympics.

item.title: Driving Home
item.description: Long drive home today. Windy, tiring, herds of tumbleweeds and clouds of blown dirt.

item.title: Seeing Mom
item.description: Went to see mom today with flowers, crystal clear blue sky, and sadness. Lunch at Mac’s with Angy and Dad, followed by laziness and memories.
